title: Predicting Multilingual and Cross-Lingual Lexical Entailment
description: Determine whether the meaning of a word in one context entails, is entailed by, or is unrelated to the meaning of another word, based on SemEval-2020 Task 2 (Glavavs et al.). Supports graded lexical entailment across multiple languages.
citation:

    title = "{S}em{E}val-2020 {T}ask 2: {P}redicting {M}ultilingual and {C}ross-{L}ingual ({G}raded) {L}exical {E}ntailment",
    author = "Glava{\v{s}}, Goran  and Vulic, Ivan  and Korhonen, Anna",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the Fourteenth Workshop on Semantic Evaluation",
    year = "2020",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/2020.semeval-1.2"
}
